entries.title: Chime Leans on AI, Pushes Upmarket in First Profitable Quarter
entries.summary: The FinTech landscape is undoubtedly a mature one these days. But as Chime Financial’s first quarter 2026 earnings call Wednesday (May 6) revealed, that doesn’t mean that firms can’t still achieve scale without abandoning growth, or that both scale and growth are ever risk-free. “We’re off to a strong start in 2026, exceeding the […] The post Chime Leans on AI, Pushes Upmarket in First Profi

entries.title: Big Tech’s Personal AI Agents Are Coming for the to-Do List
entries.summary: Google and Meta are building personal artificial intelligence agents, moving at the same time toward the same idea of an assistant that operates in the background, handles tasks without being asked twice, and gets sharper at anticipating needs the longer it runs. Google’s version is codenamed Remy, Business Insider reported Tuesday (May 5). It […] The post Big Tech’s Personal AI Agents Are C

entries.title: Anthropic CEO Predicts SaaS Pivot as AI Coding Surges
entries.summary: Software-as-a-service (SaaS) companies will need moats other than the complexity of writing software to preserve their businesses in the age of artificial intelligence that can code and write software, Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei said Tuesday (May 5). Speaking during Anthropic’s livestreamed event The Briefing: Financial Services, Amodei said companies of any significant size have […] The pos

entries.title: Banks Are Building the Trust Layer AI Can’t Break
entries.summary: Banks, payment firms and digital platforms are rebuilding identity verification around what many executives now describe as “ID supply chains,” a networked approach to trust that distributes identity checks, risk signals and verification data across multiple participants rather than locking them inside a single institution. The shift reflects mounting concern that traditional know your […] T

entries.title: Fiserv moves through ‘transition year’
entries.summary: During its first-quarter earnings report Tuesday, the payments processor’s CEO cited new executive hires and cost cuts aimed at reviving growth.

entries.title: PayPal CEO aims to keep company intact
entries.summary: In comments to analysts, the payment player’s new leader side-stepped speculation about breaking up the company, saying he sees PayPal, Venmo and Braintree together.
